description: Heldout benchmark for vox-lang adapter — covers core Vox constructs. Tasks are description-based (no starter file required). Extend with additional tasks as corpus coverage grows.

benchmarks.description: define a function named `add` that takes two integer parameters `a` and `b` and returns their sum
define a function named `greet` that takes a string parameter `name` and returns the string 'Hello, ' concatenated with name
define a workflow named `fetch_and_save` that fetches data from a URL stored in a variable `url` and saves the result to a variable `data`
define an action named `create_item` that takes a string parameter `title` and returns a new record with an `id` and the given `title`
define an action named `delete_item` that takes an integer parameter `id` and returns a boolean indicating success
write a test named `smoke` that calls `add(1, 2)` and asserts the result equals 3
define a query named `list_items` that returns a list of items, each with an `id` integer and a `name` string
define a mutation named `update_item` that takes an integer `id` and a string `title` and updates the item with the matching id
define a component named `Button` that accepts a string prop `label` and renders a clickable element displaying the label
define a page named `IndexPage` with a title 'Home' that displays a heading with the text 'Welcome'
